creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 202951
wxmaxima - update to 19.03.1, maintainership transfer

I update wxmaxima to 19.03.1.
Last changelogs can be found here:
https://github.com/wxMaxima-developers/wxmaxima/releases

The maintainer-approval flags I set means that I (the new maintainer) approve the patch; it does not tell anything about nivit (the old maintainer).
